title: gymnanthes inopinata
intro: Gymnanthes inopinata, also known as the 'Suriname-cup plant' or 'Gymnanthes', is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gymnanthes inopinata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and poultices.
